<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update an application secret"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/v1/application_secrets/{application_secret_token}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates the name of an existing API token.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"application_secret_token","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"simple"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"application_id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"name":{"type":"string"}},"required":["application_id"],"title":"ApplicationSecretPost"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
